hero.title: Websites, automations and AI workflows for small business
hero.subtitle: Landing pages, e-commerce, bots, payment flows, BaseLinker integrations, multilingual content and internal tools — from idea to a live website that works.
hero.body: Digital builder for small business, e-commerce and event projects. I build working systems — not just pages.

packages.title: What I build
packages.subtitle: Five packages with clear scope. Prices are starting points — exact quote after we review your task.

landing.title: Fast landing
landing.desc: One strong page to test an idea, service or campaign.

business.title: Project website
business.desc: Multi-page site for a business, studio or service brand.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce setup / migration
ecommerce.desc: Shopify, WooCommerce, catalog structure, payments and sync.

automation.title: Automation / bots / internal tools
automation.desc: Scripts, bots, panels and API workflows that remove manual work.

audit.title: Website rescue / audit
audit.desc: Quick audit for old sites — UX, SEO, speed, AI visibility.

works.title: Selected work
works.subtitle: From e-commerce and marketplaces to automation and service sites.

pricing.title: Starting prices
pricing.subtitle: Ranges, not fixed quotes. Exact price after task review. Audit: 500–900 PLN.

steps.title: You send the idea
steps.desc: Raw text is fine: landing, store, bot, migration or audit.

steps.title: I structure it
steps.desc: Pages, features, data, integrations, timeline and tech plan.

steps.title: We validate fast
steps.desc: Prototype or audit draft — shape before a 40-slide deck.

steps.title: Build and go live
steps.desc: Site, forms, payments, bots, SEO base, domain, instructions.

steps.title: Iterate for results
steps.desc: Metrics, content, automation, SEO/GEO — what brings leads and sales.

underHood.title: What you don't see on the cover
underHood.subtitle: This site demos itself: JSON-LD, hreflang, sitemap, llms.txt, static SSG.

cards.title: Structured data
cards.text: Organization + Person + WebSite JSON-LD on every page.

cards.title: Built for AI answers
cards.text: Public llms.txt and robots.txt for GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot.

cards.title: Multilingual architecture
cards.text: EN / PL / RU / UA with full hreflang.

cards.title: Performance as feature
cards.text: SSG, minimal JS, Core Web Vitals in the green.

contact.headline: Got an idea, project or digital chaos?
contact.subline: Show me the task — we'll map what to build and for how much.
contact.startFrom: START FROM THE IDEA — NOT A TEMPLATE
